message:
Add MCP config types and loading (Task 1)

Config parsing for .mcp.json files with env var expansion (${VAR} and
${VAR:-default}), inline spec parsing, multi-layer merge (global →
project → CLI file → CLI inline), and auto-discovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
